description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that runs on every pull request with a matrix of Linux Clang configurations. Use an ubuntu-20.04 job with a concurrency group that cancels in-progress jobs. For each combination of Clang version (7-12), dependency mode (forcefallback, default), and library type (shared, static), check out the repository, install required packages including Meson and Ninja, and then compile and test the project using Meson with C++20 standard.
